title: hopea nervosa
intro: Hopea nervosa, also known as the Yellow Meranti or Yellow Ironwood, is a species of tree in the family Dipterocarpaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Hopea nervosa include its potential to reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease, improve cognitive function, and provide antioxidant protection. Herbal preparations of Hopea nervosa may include extracts, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to make teas, capsules, or topical creams for various health applications.
